title: NoFlightReset
description: Keep Creative flight enabled when landing.
body:
Keep Flying Without Interruption!

A simple mod to make creative mode more convenient. Normally, touching the ground in creative mode forces your flight to deactivate, interrupting your workflow and frustration. With this mod, your flight mode stays active no matter where you land, letting you focus on building and exploring without constant re-enabling.

Distributing this mod to 3rd party is **allowed**!
